hooks.command: branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$branch" = "main" ] || [ "$branch" = "master" ]; then echo 'Do not commit directly to main. Use EnterWorktree first, or run /dev to start the pipeline.' && exit 2; fi

branch=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD 2>/dev/null); remote_head=$(git rev-parse origin/$branch 2>/dev/null); local_head=$(git rev-parse HEAD 2>/dev/null); if [ "$remote_head" = "$local_head" ]; then echo 'This commit has already been pushed. Create a new commit instead of amending.' && exit 2; fi
file=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -q '\.go$'; then gofmt -w "$file" 2>/dev/null; fi
